name: query-blockchain-state-lib

metadata.name: query-blockchain-state-lib
metadata.summary: Query EVM state data by batch

documentation:
# Query Blockchain State Lib
This repo is inherited from [QueryStateLib](https://github.com/TravaDataAnalysis/QueryStateLib)
### Install 
 
> pip3 install query-blockchain-state-lib

### Example do query state batch at client

* [Example used](_test/test_client_querier.py)

Github :https://github.com/Centic-io/query-blockchain-state-lib

* Use [Ethereum Json-pc](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/4117254/ethereum-json-rpc/RVu7CT5J#23129825-2012-07dd-66bb-c0d76b4e28dc)

### Base

* Use Ethereum JSON-RPC call to interact with EVM node provider
* Postman usage: [Link](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/4117254/ethereum-json-rpc/RVu7CT5J)

classes.name: query_state_lib.base.executors.bounded_executor.BoundedExecutor
documentation:
BoundedExecutor behaves as a ThreadPoolExecutor which will block on
calls to submit() once the limit given as "bound" work items are queued for
execution.
\:param bound: Integer - the maximum number of items in the work queue
\:param max_workers: Integer - the size of the thread pool

methods.name: query_state_lib.base.executors.batch_work_executor.BatchWorkExecutor._try_decrease_batch_size
documentation: Some acceptable race conditions are possible
Executes the given work in batches, reducing the batch size exponentially in case of errors.

functions.name: query_state_lib.base.providers.ipc.has_valid_json_rpc_ending
documentation: A valid JSON RPC response can only end in } or ] http://www.jsonrpc.org/specification

classes.name: query_state_lib.base.providers.ipc.BatchIPCProvider
documentation: Mostly copied from web3.py/providers/ipc.py. Supports batch requests.
Will be removed once batch feature is added to web3.py https://github.com/ethereum/web3.py/issues/832
Also see this optimization https://github.com/ethereum/web3.py/pull/849

functions.name: query_state_lib.client.client_querier._sent_batch
documentation:
---
param func_sent_handler: |-
  is a function with argument is a request
  request is a list , each element is a dict with form of json rpc like :

  > {
  >
  > : 'jsonrpc': '2.0',
  >   'method': method,
  >   'params': params,
  >   'id': request_id,
  >
  > }
param list_json_rpc: true
return: true
---

methods.name: query_state_lib.client.client_querier.ClientQuerier.sent_batch_to_state_querier
documentation:
---
param list_json_rpc: true
return: true
---

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.MoralisError
documentation: Base class for all exceptions in python-arango.

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.MoralisClientError
documentation:
Base class for errors originating from python-arango client.

```
param msg

Error message.

type msg

str

cvar source

Source of the error (always set to "client").

vartype source

str

ivar message

Error message.

vartype message

str
```

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.MoralisServerError
documentation:
Base class for errors originating from ArangoDB server.

```
param resp

HTTP response.

type resp

arango.response.Response

param msg

Error message override.

type msg

str

cvar source

Source of the error (always set to "server").

vartype source

str

ivar message

Exception message.

vartype message

str

ivar url

API URL.

vartype url

str

ivar response

HTTP response object.

vartype response

arango.response.Response

ivar request

HTTP request object.

vartype request

arango.request.Request

ivar http_method

HTTP method in lowercase (e.g. "post").

vartype http_method

str

ivar http_code

HTTP status code.

vartype http_code

int

ivar http_headers

Response headers.

vartype http_headers

dict

ivar error_code

Error code from ArangoDB server.

vartype error_code

int

ivar error_message

Raw error message from ArangoDB server.

vartype error_message

str
```

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerConnectionError
documentation: Failed to connect to ArangoDB server.
Server Exceptions #

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerRequiredDBVersionError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerReadLogError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerLogLevelSetError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerReloadRoutingError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerMetricsError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerRoleError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerTLSReloadError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.exceptions.ServerEncryptionError

classes.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.moralis_http.HTTPClient

methods.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.moralis_http.HTTPClient.create_session
documentation:
Return a new requests session given the host URL.

This method must be overridden by the user.

```
param host

Moralis host URL.

type host

str

returns

Requests session object.

rtype

requests.Session
```

methods.name: query_state_lib.client.moralis_client.moralis_http.HTTPClient.send_request
documentation:
Send an HTTP request.

This method must be overridden by the user.

```
param session

Requests session object.

type session

requests.Session

param method

HTTP method in lowercase (e.g. "post").

type method

str

param url

Request URL.

type url

str

param headers

Request headers.

type headers

dict

param params

URL (query) parameters.

type params

dict

param data

Request payload.

type data

str | MultipartEncoder | None

param auth

Username and password.

type auth

tuple

returns

HTTP response.

rtype

arango.response.Response
```
Abstract base class for HTTP clients.
